stemHtml: What is the definition of urgency? A condition…

options.a: of being threatened by serious and/or imminent danger and of requiring immediate assistance.
options.b: concerning the attitude of an aircraft when intercepting the localizer during an ILS approach which does not require immediate assistance.
options.c: concerning the safety of a person on board or within sight and requiring immediate assistance.
options.d: concerning the safety of an aircraft other vehicles or of a person on board, but which does not require immediate assistance.
